items.name: Banana
items.description: Place a banana token on the space immediately behind your car. If an opponent ends their movement on that space this round, they must add 1 Stress card from the box to their hand. If this is dropped on someone or if they are driving past, they must roll a d6 and if a 1 is rolled, they must go back 1 space.
items.balancing_notes: Transitioned from Heat/Spin-out penalty to deck-dilution (Stress) penalty. Added coin incentive for strategic placement.

items.name: Red Shell
items.description: Fire a Red Shell (Forward or Backward, max 15 spaces). Target shifts down 1 gear (min 1st). If already in 1st, they take 1 Stress instead. Shielding: While holding, discard to cancel an incoming Shell or Fireball.
items.balancing_notes: Removed tiered power as was too OP. Added passive defense utility.

items.name: Mushroom
items.description: Perform a Free Boost. Flip the top card of your deck and move that many spaces. This does not cost Heat and does not count toward your Speed for corner checks. Double (Pay 2 Coins): Flip two cards, choose the higher value. Triple (Pay 5 Coins): Flip three cards, move sum of two highest.
items.balancing_notes: Integrated with Heat boost mechanic while bypassing Heat cost and Corner Speed checks. Multi-card flipping added as a coin sink.

items.name: Star
items.description: For this round, you are Invincible (immune to items). Power: Gain 2 temporary Heat tokens to use for Corners or Boosting this turn (return to box at end of round). Passing: For every opponent you pass during your move, gain 1 Coin and move +1 additional space.
items.balancing_notes: Aligned with user turn sequence. Balanced invincibility with a Heat buffer (+2) rather than total corner immunity to prevent game-breaking leads.

items.name: Blue Shell
items.description: Launch a Blue Shell at the Race Leader. The leader and any car on the same space or 1 space behind must immediately shift down to 1st Gear (min 1st).
items.balancing_notes: Added 'Splash Zone' mechanic to mimic the Mario Kart explosion. Rewards the user heavily for hitting a bunched-up lead pack.

items.name: Bullet Bill
items.description: Blast forward! Base Effect: Move +10 spaces. You may ignore all Corner Speed Limits for this round (pay 0 Heat). If in 1st Place: Move +3 spaces instead.
items.balancing_notes: High-power catch-up item. Includes a nerf for 1st place to prevent runaway leads if someone manages to hoard one.

items.name: Yellow Coin
items.description: Gain 5 Coins immediately. You may also move +1 space now. Spend Coins (End of Turn): 5 for 1 Heat, 7 for a Sponsorship, 10 for an Upgrade (Choose 1 of 2). Purchased cards are shuffled into your draw pile. Coins can also be carried onto the next race if in a championship.
items.balancing_notes: Shifted to primary currency driver. Added a small movement bonus to make it useful for immediate positioning.

items.name: Red Coin
items.description: Gain 7 Coins immediately. You may also choose to move +1 space now. See yellow coin description for costs of cards.
items.balancing_notes: Reduced from 10 to 7 to prevent instant permanent Upgrades. Aligned with Sponsorship cost to create a tactical choice.

items.name: Green Shell
items.description: Fire a Green Shell forwards or backwards in your current lane. It travels 3 spaces, hitting EVERY car in its path. Effect: Targets shift down 1 gear (min 1st). Shielding: While holding, discard to cancel an incoming Shell or Fireball. Snipe (Pay 2 Coins): Increase range to 6 spaces.
items.balancing_notes: Piercing multi-hit mechanic added. Range is intentionally short to balance the lane-wide hit potential.

items.name: Fire Flower
items.description: Launch a wide wave of fireballs. It affects EVERY car in the 3 spaces directly ahead of you (all lanes). Effect: Affected opponents must move 1 Heat from their Engine to their Discard pile. If they have no Heat, they take 1 Stress instead.
items.balancing_notes: Standardized as an area-of-effect disruption item. Attacks Heat supply to limit opponents' future movement options.

items.name: Ice Flower
items.description: Use while in 3rd Gear or higher. Choose one: Move 2 Heat from your Hand to your Engine, OR add 1 Heat from the Box to your Engine.
items.balancing_notes: Drafted by user. Primarily a defensive/stabilizing item for front-runners to manage heat while maintaining speed.

items.name: Lightning
items.description: Shock every opponent ahead of you. Base Effect: Targets shift down 1 gear. Overcharge (Pay 2 Coins): Tiered gears down (Dist 0-6: 1 gear, 7-16: 2 gears, 17+: 3 gears). All Hits: Targets discard 1 random card from hand.
items.balancing_notes: Balanced catch-up item with a coin-based 'super' mode to reward earlier tactical play.

items.name: Blooper
items.description: Ink all opponents ahead of you. Vision (Blind Play): Affected players must shuffle and choose a card without looking and place it on the table, then play the rest of their cards equal to their gear. If they pick an illegal card (e.g., an Upgrade they cannot pay for, or a Heat card), they must redraw. Gain two coins for each car that exceeds a corner check on the next round.
items.balancing_notes: Combines information denial with direct gear stick sabotage. Lasting 1-round effect.

items.name: Golden Mushroom
items.description: For this round and the next 2 rounds, you have the Golden Touch. Infinite Boost: Perform standard Boosts for 0 Heat. Golden Line: Gain +1 Speed Tolerance on Corner Checks. Gilded Speed (Pay 4 Coins): Increase Corner Tolerance to +2 for the duration.
items.balancing_notes: A powerful endgame item. The 3-round duration is balanced by a modest +1 tolerance, with a high coin cost for the +2 'super' version.
